CurrentIssues.ID: LongParameterList:Transaction.kt$Transaction$( open val transactionId: String, open val walletId: String, open val walletType: WalletType, open val type: TxType, open val state: TxState, open val createdAt: Long, open val updatedAt: Long, open val completedAt: Long?, open val note: String?, open val invoice: String?, open val amountInBtc: Double, open val amountInUsd: Double?, open val exchangeRate: String?, open val totalFeeInBtc: String?, )
